description:
Goal: make the fz-rh2.16.8/16.10/16.11 arc landable again by bringing this branch forward onto the current fz-tkf baseline before attempting the 16.11.4 closeout.

Grounding: clean HEAD on this worktree (4bb4db879) is red outside compiler2 closeout scope: ir_codegen::ir_codegen_test::materialization_keeps_selective_receive_outcome_bodies_reachable and ir_planner::ir_planner_test::repr_seam_closure_predicate_registers_captured_wrapper_callable_entry fail here, but both pass on current fz-tkf. That means the source-production branch is stale relative to the main line, and 16.11.4 cannot be honestly closed on top of this baseline.

Strategy: rebase or forward-port the definition-macro arc onto current fz-tkf, resolve the old-world planner/materialization drift, then re-run the 16.11.4 closeout and verification surface on the rebased branch.

Signal: the rebased branch is green on the old-world parity tests that currently fail here, and 16.11.4 can then close on a truthful baseline.
title: Forward-port the definition-macro arc onto current fz-tkf and recover old-world ir_codegen/ir_planner parity
